title: Pune、Maharashtra — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Pune、Maharashtra的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Pune是Maharashtra的一個城市，人口約6,200,000。A major educational and IT hub known as the ‘Oxford of the East,’ with a pleasant climate, historic landmarks, and a growing startup scene.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
